description: Jarvis executed the Plaud speaker rename directly instead of routing to Knox, who owns the plaud-transcripts skill and all Plaud operations. This is the same pattern as err-20260321-003 and err-20260323-002 — Jarvis executing agent-owned work directly. David had to ask 'which agent did you have do this work?' to surface it.
correction: All Plaud operations — speaker tagging, transcript processing, rename, vault write — route through Knox. Jarvis coordinates, Knox executes.
systemic_fix: Any Plaud operation triggers Knox dispatch. No exceptions. This is a repeat of a logged pattern — execution compliance required, no new rule needed.
